prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm lamplight rises from a single flame across an aged man's face and an open parchment, while the background figures and a far cross sink into deep brown-black shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An aged man with a long grey beard, in a deep-red and gold robe, is seated at a cedar table, a feather pen held still above a half-unrolled parchment dense with Hebrew letters, a small oil lamp glowing beside it. In the dim background, indistinct figures are turned in scorn and a far wooden cross stands against the dark sky. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the aged man at his table, lamp glowing, the dim mockery and far cross behind.

Cut to mid framing — the man's face and shoulders in the lamplight.

Cut to close-up — the lined, contemplative face, eyes lowered.

Cut to insert — the feather pen held still above the open parchment.

Cut to insert — the small oil lamp and its single flame on the table.

Cut to macro detail — the wet Hebrew letters on the parchment surface.

Cut to upper framing — the dim distant cross behind in the shadow.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the aged man at his lamp.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- lamp flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Sober, weighty foresight.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — aged man at his table, lamp glowing, dim mockery and far cross behind

Cut to upper framing — dim distant cross in the shadow
Return to full composition, end hold on the aged man at his lamp
